2026-07-06FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Romania with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Moldova and as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of BulgariaAppointment of Kevin Rex as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Romania with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Moldova and as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Bulgaria, with residence in Bucharest.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Romania with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Moldova and as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Bulgaria
precis: Appointment of Kevin Rex as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to Romania with concurrent accreditation as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Moldova and as Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary of Canada to the Republic of Bulgaria, with residence in Bucharest.
